description: As a Cyber Threat Intelligence Analyst, create a formal Attack Tree diagram in draw.io Desktop visualizing the attack paths used by LockBit 3.0 ransomware based on the CISA/FBI advisory in '~/Desktop/lockbit_report.txt'. The diagram must be a hierarchical tree starting with the root node 'LockBit Ransomware Infection', followed by Tactics (Level 1) and specific Techniques with MITRE IDs (Levels 2/3). Use logic gates (AND/OR) to represent relationships and apply color coding: Red for Root Goal and Impact, Orange for Lateral Movement/Escalation, and Blue for Initial Access/Reconnaissance. Ensure the diagram is legible, connected, and explicitly includes the MITRE T-codes mentioned in the report. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/lockbit_attack_tree.drawio' and export it as a PNG image to '~/Desktop/lockbit_attack_tree.png'.
